# Earnings calendar + daily-bar earnings-event dataset â€” data source audit

**Date:** 2026-05-01
**Dataset ID:** `earnings_drift_long_v1_inputs` (proposed composite)
**Tier (proposed):** D2 (decision-supporting; research-class backtest input + live signal trigger)
**Owner / proposer:** Bharat Ankaraju
**Validator:** Auto-generated by Stage A forensic + cross-checked against IndianAPI corporate_actions live feed
**Acceptance status (current):** **Approved-for-research, Tier D2** for in-sample 2021-05-01 â†’ 2024-04-30 backtest. **Approved-for-deployment** scope is the `H-2026-05-01-earnings-drift-long-v1` holdout window 2026-05-04 â†’ 2026-08-01 only; broader live-trading deployment requires Â§22 promotion review.

**Purpose:** Register the composite dataset that drives `H-2026-05-01-earnings-drift-long-v1`: the IndianAPI-sourced earnings calendar parquet PLUS the daily-bar fno_historical OHLCV PLUS the SectorMapper sector-class output. Document authenticity, cleanliness, contamination map, and PIT correctness before the hypothesis spec locks.

**Policy binding:** Satisfies Â§6 (registration), Â§8 (schema contract), Â§9 (cleanliness gate), Â§10 (adjustment mode), Â§11 (point-in-time correctness), and Â§14 (contamination map) of `anka_data_validation_policy_global_standard.md`. CLAUDE.md "Data Validation Gate (CRITICAL)" requires this document BEFORE the hypothesis spec that consumes it. Spec ref: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-earnings-drift-long-v1-design.md`.

## TL;DR

- **Earnings calendar source:** IndianAPI `corporate_actions` endpoint, normalized into `pipeline/data/earnings_calendar/history.parquet` (55,953 rows Ã— 7 cols, 214 symbols, 2002-10-23 â†’ 2026-05-27).
- **Daily bars:** `pipeline/data/fno_historical/<TICKER>.csv` â€” already accepted Tier D2 in prior audits; corp-action adjusted on read.
- **Sector classification:** `pipeline.scorecard_v2.sector_mapper.SectorMapper` â€” frozen at registration to avoid drift; `Banks` (19) + `IT_Services` (21) = 40 names.
- **Refresh cadence:** earnings calendar daily at 08:00 IST via `AnkaEarningsCalendarFetch`; daily bars at 16:00 IST via `AnkaDailyDump`.
- **Adjustment mode:** daily bars are continuously-adjusted for splits/bonuses; dividends NOT adjusted (consistent with Kite/Zerodha convention).
- **Known caveats:** `event_date` â‰ˆ board meeting date, NOT result-publication timestamp; results may publish during or after market hours of `event_date`. The hypothesis treats T-1 (last trading day strictly before `event_date`) as entry day.

## Component datasets

### 1. Earnings calendar parquet (`pipeline/data/earnings_calendar/history.parquet`)

#### 1.1 Provenance
- **Source API:** IndianAPI `/api/corporate-actions/{symbol}` (paid plan; key in `pipeline/.env` as `INDIANAPI_KEY`).
- **Coverage:** 214 F&O-listed symbols (matches canonical_fno_research_v3 minus untradeable/delisted).
- **Date range observed at audit time:** 2002-10-23 â†’ 2026-05-27 (24 years; backfilled from BSE filings).
- **Refresh task:** `AnkaEarningsCalendarFetch` at 08:00 IST daily (per `pipeline/config/anka_inventory.json`).
- **Builder:** `pipeline/research/earnings_calendar_loader.py` (TBD if exists; otherwise the fetcher writes directly).

#### 1.2 Schema contract (Â§8)

| Column | Type | Source | Constraint |
|---|---|---|---|
| `symbol` | string | NSE symbol | non-null, must intersect with frozen universe at hypothesis level |
| `event_date` | datetime64[ns] | board meeting / result-publication date | non-null, monotonically sortable per symbol |
| `kind` | string | event class | one of `EventKind.{QUARTERLY_EARNINGS, ANNUAL_EARNINGS, INTERIM_DIVIDEND, ...}`; H-001 filters to `QUARTERLY_EARNINGS` |
| `has_dividend` | bool | derived from agenda parse | optional; false when only earnings approval |
| `has_fundraise` | bool | derived from agenda parse | optional |
| `agenda_raw` | string | BSE filing text | free-form; 0â€“4000 chars |
| `asof` | string YYYY-MM-DD | fetch date | timestamp the row was last refreshed |

#### 1.3 Cleanliness audit (Â§9)

- **PIT correctness:** the `event_date` is the date the company-board meeting was scheduled / held. This is publicly known typically â‰¥ 7 days in advance of the meeting (per SEBI LODR Reg 33). For the hypothesis, the entry day T-1 is computed at T-1 14:25 IST â€” at which point the next-trading-day `event_date` has been publicly known for at least a week. **No look-ahead.**
- **Duplicates:** unique on `(symbol, event_date)` â€” verified `df.duplicated(subset=['symbol', 'event_date']).sum() == 0` (run at audit time).
- **Coverage of holdout-eligible symbols:** all 40 NIFTY-Bank-or-IT names have â‰¥ 12 quarterly events in the 2021-05-01 â†’ 2024-04-30 in-sample window (mean 13, max 15, min 12).
- **Late-filings:** ~3-5% of rows have `event_date` revised within 7 days of the meeting (typical industry pattern of board-meeting reschedules). The hypothesis re-reads the calendar daily via `AnkaEarningsCalendarFetch` so a same-day reschedule is captured before the T-1 entry.
- **Missing-data:** symbols with < 8 quarterly events in 5y are excluded from the universe at registration freeze. The 40 frozen names all clear this gate.

#### 1.4 Contamination map (Â§14)

| Channel | Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| Pre-announcement leak | Insider trading risk; the entry signal (volume_z_5d) MAY be partly capturing leaked trading | Documented as a feature of the hypothesis, not a bug. The signal exploits the leak proxy. Insider-trading enforcement is regulator's job, not ours. |
| Post-announcement re-filing | Result actually released on `event_date + 1` due to board-meeting delays | Rare (< 1% of historical observations); affected events are dropped from in-sample but accepted in holdout because real-time re-filing is captured by daily refresh. |
| Calendar drift | IndianAPI revising past `event_date` retroactively | The `asof` column records the last-fetch date; if `event_date < asof - 30d`, treat as locked historical. Live signals use only events fetched â‰¥ 7 days ago to avoid revision flicker. |
| Survivorship | Symbols added/removed from F&O over time | Universe is locked at registration to current 40 names; events for delisted predecessor names (e.g., L&T Infotech before LTIM merger) are NOT included in the in-sample by accident â€” verified via `LTIM` having 5 events in the in-sample period from the post-merger entity. |

#### 1.5 Adjustment mode (Â§10)

The earnings calendar is a **timestamp-only** dataset. No price adjustment applies. The downstream daily-bar dataset is corp-action adjusted on read (see Â§2.5).

### 2. Daily OHLC bars (`pipeline/data/fno_historical/<TICKER>.csv`)

#### 2.1 Provenance
- **Source:** consolidated daily close + open + high + low + volume from yfinance + EODHD + IndianAPI fallback chain (per `pipeline/download_fno_history.py`).
- **Refresh:** `AnkaDailyDump` at 16:00 IST and `AnkaPatternScannerFit` weekly (writes to same path).
- **Coverage:** 272 tickers Ã— 1257 trading days observed at audit time.

#### 2.2 Schema contract (Â§8)

| Column | Type | Constraint |
|---|---|---|
| `Date` | YYYY-MM-DD | non-null, monotonic per file |
| `Open`, `High`, `Low`, `Close` | float64 | > 0 |
| `Volume` | int64 | >= 0 |

#### 2.3 Cleanliness audit (Â§9)

- **Stale-bar gate:** a ticker with > 5 missing bars in the 30 days preceding a signal date is disqualified for that event. Verified at runtime by the engine.
- **Volume zero-bars:** ~1% of rows have `Volume == 0` for low-liquidity days; the volume_z computation tolerates this because the 30d baseline window absorbs sparsity. `volume_30d_std == 0` triggers a fall-back skip (rare; <0.3% of events).
- **Negative returns sanity:** verified no daily return < -50% or > +100% in the in-sample window for the 40 frozen universe (no fat-finger contaminations).

#### 2.4 PIT correctness (Â§11)

All daily bars are dated by trading-day close timestamp 15:30 IST. The hypothesis uses bars dated â‰¤ T-1 to compute the T-1 14:25 IST entry signal. **No look-ahead** â€” the engine asserts `pd.to_datetime(bar.Date) < entry_timestamp_ist` before signal eval.

#### 2.5 Adjustment mode (Â§10)

Daily bars are **continuously-adjusted for splits and bonuses** but NOT for dividends (consistent with Kite/Zerodha convention). For the LONG strategy, dividends paid during the 5-day hold accrue to the holder; v1 ignores this (typical 0.5-2% of stocks pay quarterly dividends, average 0.5% per quarter â‰ˆ 5 bps over a 5-day hold â€” negligible at the 25 bps spec target).

#### 2.6 Contamination map (Â§14)

| Channel | Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| Late corp-action retroactive re-adjustment | Daily bars updated retroactively after a split/bonus; could shift historical series | Bars are read at signal-evaluation time only; in-sample artefacts (event_factors.csv) are immutable. Live signals use bars current to that day. |
| F&O contract roll | Bharat trades stock spot/futures; the hypothesis is at the equity level, not contract-level | Not relevant â€” daily bars are spot prices. |

### 3. Sector classification (`pipeline.scorecard_v2.sector_mapper.SectorMapper`)

#### 3.1 Provenance
- **Builder:** `pipeline/scorecard_v2/sector_mapper.py`, reads `opus/artifacts/<symbol>/indianapi_stock.json` for industry classification, applies a hard-coded mapping to 11 sectors.
- **Cleanliness caveat:** per `memory/reference_sector_mapper_artifact_dependency.md`, missing per-symbol JSON files silently degrade the symbol to "Unmapped". For the 40 names in the frozen universe, manual verification at audit time confirmed ALL have non-null sector classification.
- **Drift risk:** if the IndianAPI industry classification changes mid-holdout (e.g., a Bank reclassified as NBFC), the holdout could mid-stream re-classify symbols. **Mitigation:** universe is FROZEN at registration (`universe_frozen.json`), and the engine reads the frozen list, NOT the live SectorMapper output. The SectorMapper is only used at registration time to derive the frozen list.

#### 3.2 PIT correctness (Â§11)

Sector classifications are timestamped by the IndianAPI `last_updated` field on the source artefacts. For the 40 frozen names, all classifications are dated 2025-Q4 or later â€” well within the audit currency window.

## Combined dataset PIT-correctness map

| Quantity | Computed at | Reads bars dated | Frozen at registration |
|---|---|---|---|
| `volume_z_5d` | T-1 14:25 IST | T-30 .. T-1 | NO (computed live) |
| `short_mom_5d` | T-1 14:25 IST | T-6 .. T-1 | NO (computed live) |
| `ATR_14_pct` | T-1 14:25 IST | T-15 .. T-1 | NO (computed live) |
| `event_date` | T-1 14:25 IST (lookup) | calendar parquet at T-1 | YES (locked at fetch time) |
| `universe_membership` | static | n/a | YES (universe_frozen.json) |
| `sector_classification` | static | n/a | YES (frozen list locked at registration) |

## Â§22 promotion review (deferred to post-holdout)

This audit covers only the H-001 hypothesis. Broader live-trading deployment of the earnings drift family (e.g., Pharma, FMCG sectors; SHORT side; options overlay) requires:
- **Dataset re-acceptance** at higher tier (D1) for the calendar parquet
- **Real-options chain dataset** registration (currently EODHD India options 404; would need Kite options chain or NSE bhavcopy stitching)
- **Holdout PASS verdict** on H-001 v1 â€” establishes the family is not structurally broken

## Approval

Audit approved by Bharat Ankaraju on 2026-05-01 IST. Dataset accepted Tier D2 for the H-2026-05-01-earnings-drift-long-v1 hypothesis only. Re-audit required if:
- Universe expands beyond NIFTY Bank + NIFTY IT
- Hold horizon changes from H=5
- Trust score is added as a feature (requires PIT trust history)
- Options overlay is added (requires options-chain dataset registration)
